revision.comment: bot edit - > adding mini set to infobox/removing manual category

revision.text:
{{Location infobox | type = Area | sector id = 1244 | within = Auric Basin | hero challenges=2 | points-of-interest=9 | vistas = 2 | waypoints = 1 | gallery1 = Tarir, The Forgotten City.jpg | requires = hot | connections = [[Bristleback Chasm]] (E)
[[Gilded Hollow]] (I)
[[Arrowhead Vale]] (N)
[[Maguuma Shallows]] (NE)
[[Westwatch Patch]] (NW)
[[Southwatch Creep]] (S)
[[Mossheart Walk]] (SE)
[[The Falls]] (SW)
[[Lastgear Standing]] (W) }} {{Quotation|[[The Exalted: Pure Dedication]]|Deep in the wilds of Maguuma, under a canopy so thick that midday often seems like midnight, there is a shining golden city called Tarir...}} [[Tarir, the Forgotten City]], is the golden city of the [[Exalted]]. It was established by the [[Forgotten]] around two hundred years ago as part of [[Glint]]'s [[The Legacy|legacy]] and plan to protect [[Tyria (world)|the world]] from the [[Elder Dragon]]s. During the construction, the Forgotten chose [[human]]s from the earliest generation of [[Zephyrites]] to test in hopes of them being worthy of becoming guardians of Tarir and the purpose it holds. Those who passed the Forgotten's tests became the Exalted and finished construction of Tarir before going into hibernation for two centuries. During this time, Tarir remained dormant, waiting for [[Glint's Egg]] to come near. The Exalted of Tarir awoke from hibernation in 1328 AE shortly before the [[Pact|Pact Fleet]] launched over the [[Heart of Maguuma]]. The [[magic]] built within the city awoke as Glint's Egg came near, ready to fulfill the purpose of guarding the egg. Beneath Tarir lies a series of chambers made by the Forgotten to test the [[Pact Commander|eventual champion]] of Glint's Egg. These were left untouched, and unknown, by the Exalted until the egg came near Tarir. Parts of Tarir, especially the [[Inner Chamber]], hold structural resemblance to [[the Hall of Heroes]] with its heavy use of gold and stained glass. == Locations and objectives == [[File:Tarir.jpg|thumb|300px|The city of Tarir awakened by an Exalted.]] ;Waypoints :{{map objective|waypoint|Forgotten City Waypoint|id=1990}} ;Points of Interest :{{map objective|point of interest|Eastgate|id=2019}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Inner Chamber|id=2007}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Legacy Pillars|id=2024}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Luminate's Throne|id=1987}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Masks of the Fallen|id=2018}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Northgate|id=1993}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Sealed Passageway|id=2057}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Southgate|id=2038}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Westgate|id=2029}} ;Hero Challenges :{{map objective|hero challenge|Champion Tarnished Sage}} :{{map objective|hero challenge|Exalted Overlook}} ;Mastery Insights :{{mastery point|region=Heart of Thorns}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Luminate's Throne]] :{{mastery point|region=Heart of Thorns}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Masks of the Fallen]] ;Vistas :{{map objective|vista|Inner Chamber Vista|id=2232}}
*Start the adventure to gain the glint skills, turn around and walk to the cliff behind the vista. Use skill 1 to climb the cliff, followed by skill 3 on the ceiling - glide to the vista from the highest point of the jump. *Alternately, if you have the springer mount, simply jump to the vista. :{{map objective|vista|Tarir Vista|id=2249}} ;Adventures :{{map objective|adventure|Fallen Masks}} :{{map objective|adventure|On Wings of Gold}} :{{map objective|adventure|Sanctum Scramble}} ;Events {{area events}} == NPCs == === Allies === ;[[Asura]] * [[Genessy]] * [[Obstructor Rora]] * [[Researcher Vera]] * [[Veteran Vigil Medic]] ;[[Bird]]s * [[Burrowing Chicken]] * [[Raven (NPC)|Raven]] * [[The Golden Chicken|Golden Chicken]] ;[[Exalted]] * [[Exalted Bastion]] * [[Exalted Burnisher]] * [[Exalted Camas]] * [[Exalted Sage]] * [[Exalted Sufa]] * [[Exalted Taon]] * [[Sage Laural]] * [[Sage Renna]] * [[Sage Salim]] * [[Tarnished Bastion]] * [[Tarnished Burnisher]] * [[Tarnished Sage]] ;[[Human]]s * [[Historian Jasmine]] * [[Historian Landen]] * [[Vigil Crusader (Bladed armor)|Vigil Crusader]] (Bladed armor) ;[[Norn]] * [[Bartimus Swordheart]] * [[Explorer Johan]] * [[Vigil Crusader (Chak weapon)|Vigil Crusader]] (Chak weapon) ;[[Skritt]] * [[Distressed Scavenger]] * [[Leeneeta]] === Services === :{{vendor|reinforce armor}} [[Anvil]] :{{vendor|merchant}} [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] :{{vendor|merchant}} [[Itzel Mastery Vendor]] :{{vendor|merchant}} [[Nuhoch Mastery Vendor]] :{{vendor|merchant}} [[Vigil Tactician]] === Foes === ;[[Ambient creature]]s *[[Frog]] *[[Mosquito (Ambient creature)|Mosquito]] *[[Osprey]] *[[Rat]] *[[Sparkfly]] *[[Spider (Ambient creature)|Spider]] *[[Tropical Bird]] ;[[Insect]]s *[[Firefly]] ;[[Tengu]] *[[Champion Quetzal Commander]] *[[Veteran Quetzal Assassin]] *[[Veteran Quetzal Scout]] *[[Veteran Quetzal Warrior]] == Ambient dialogue == {{section-stub|location|missing dialogue from skritt on upper levels, and perhaps elsewhere.}} :'''Priory Explorer (1):''' ''How far is that drop?'' :'''Priory Explorer (2):''' ''It looks far. Hm...'' :'''Priory Explorer (1):''' ''Do you think you'd make it, even with your [[glider]]?'' :'''Priory Explorer (2):''' ''Depends on the direction of the wind.'' :'''Vigil Recruit:''' ''Have you seen those oversized beasts to the south?'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''I have! I'm not sure what they are, but they definitely don't look friendly.'' :'''Vigil Recruit:''' ''What do you think they eat?'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''I don't know. I heard the [[Itzel]] refer to them as [[saurian]]s.'' :'''Vigil Recruit:''' ''That name doesn’t sound too scary. Maybe they're passive?'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''(laugh) Then these saurians can eat humans. The [[charr]] [[High Legion|legions]] inherit [[Tyria]].'' :'''Historian Landen:''' ''What have you found so far?'' :'''Historian Jasmine:''' ''What haven't I found? This place is amazing!'' :'''Historian Landen:''' ''Have you been able to determine the age of the [[city]]?'' :'''Historian Jasmine:''' ''Not yet. It's over a hundred years old, for sure.'' :'''Historian Landen:''' ''And you were so worried about coming here...This city is astounding.'' :'''Historian Jasmine:''' ''I was terrified that the Exalted were somehow related to the [[Mursaat]], but there is no evidence to connect them.'' :'''Historian Jasmine:''' ''I was hoping to find more signs of the [[Druid (group)|druids]] who once inhabited the [[Maguuma Jungle|jungle]].'' :'''Historian Landen:''' ''Hmmm...'' :'''Historian Landen:''' ''These details, the level of craftsmanship... just incredible.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''A whole golden city! We could at least break a piece off. No one would notice.'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''Be respectful! We can't just walk into their city and start breaking things.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Hmph. We've done it before.'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''You look too relaxed. Stay on your toes. We might need to fight soon.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''I'm always ready for a fight!'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''There's not enough treasure to take!'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''There's never enough treasure for you. Is that the only reason you came here?'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Is there any other reason?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''Where's your sense of wonder? Look around you. This is amazing!'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Think we could run into [[Braham]] out here?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''We're surrounded by floating, sentient sentinels, and you're just hoping to meet Braham Eirsson?'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Do you think we'll run into him, or not?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''(sigh)'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Because that'd be something.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''What do you make of all the [[revenant]]s running around lately?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''Their ability to channel power from [[the Mists]] is fascinating.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Hmmm, bet they're pretty good with [[sword]]s.'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''(snort) You aren't smart enough to become one. You'd only wind up trapped in the Mists.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''I didn't say I wanted to become one, just curious what you thought of them.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''I feel like I need another sword. Do you think I need a new sword?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''(grumble)'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Maybe two more?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''(sigh)'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''You're right, why limit myself?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''Isn't it incredible just to be here, taking all this in?'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Yeah... Nothing like swinging a sword around.'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''We should stick around and see what we can do to help out.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''You think there's something to eat around here?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''Just think, there are bound to be hidden areas all over this city...'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''(yawn) Well, I'm bored. Want to duel?'' :'''Obstructor Rora:''' ''You are the worst person to adventure with, sometimes.'' :'''Bartimus Swordheart:''' ''Ever seen [[Hoelbrak]]? That's a grand, epic place. Maybe if I grew up on a farm or something, I'd be more impressed.'' :'''Explorer Johan:''' ''Leave the Exalted alone!'' :'''Researcher Vera:''' ''I'm not bothering him. I've been studying him for a while, and I haven't seen him move once...'' :'''Explorer Johan:''' ''He's guarding the city. They were built for this. He may never move.'' :'''Researcher Vera:''' ''I'm just going to wait a bit longer.'' :'''Researcher Vera:''' ''This is incredible—an entire city hidden in the depths of the jungle!'' :'''Explorer Johan:''' ''I know this is exciting, but we have to stay focused. This area isn't safe.'' :'''Researcher Vera:''' ''Imagine the knowledge that the Exalted must hold! I wish we had more time.'' ;[[Leeneeta]] passes by two Exalted in the northwest of the northern quadrant of Tarir :'''Leeneeta:''' ''This is the best day of my life!'' :'''Leeneeta:''' ''Shinies!'' :'''Leeneeta:''' ''Shinies! So much shinies! Aaaaah!'' :'''Leeneeta:''' ''(gasp) So shiny…'' :'''Leeneeta:''' ''Shiny, shiny, shiny, shiny!'' :'''Leeneeta:''' ''I’m in love!'' :'''Exalted Bastion:''' ''I don't understand what they are.'' :'''Exalted Burnisher:''' ''They sound like small rodents, but look like large ones.'' :'''Exalted Bastion:''' ''What is it doing?'' :'''Exalted Bastion:''' ''Every time this animal gets near me, it screams about how shiny I am and runs away.'' :'''Exalted Burnisher:''' ''I would not call that a sign of attraction.'' :'''Exalted Bastion:''' ''Understood.'' :'''Priory Scribe:''' ''I think whatever’s powering this city is connected to those pylons.'' :'''Priory Researcher:''' ''Are you suggesting the pylons power this entire city?'' :'''Priory Scribe:''' ''Well, I doubt that, but there does seem to be some kind of connection.'' :'''Priory Researcher:''' ''I have noticed those giant pieces of [[Enchanted Armor|enchanted armor]] around, every time a pylon powers up.'' :'''Priory Scribe:''' ''So that’s one connection. But there has to be more than that.'' :'''Priory Researcher:''' ''If only we could get the enchanted armor to talk to us. I’ve tried, but there was no response.'' :'''Priory Scribe:''' ''Is that so? I bet I can get one to talk.'' ;Near Luminate's Throne :'''Exalted Sage (1):''' ''I don’t know how much more we can take. These attacks are wearing us down.'' :'''Exalted Sage (2):''' ''I understand your fear. The [[Mordrem Guard]] are getting stronger by the hour.'' :'''Exalted Sage (1):''' ''Do you think they can breach our walls?'' :'''Exalted Sage (2):''' ''I hope not. I’ve heard whispers about the trial rooms being a weak spot of ours.'' :'''Exalted Sage (1):''' ''We have extra guards on watch down there. Hopefully that will be enough.'' == Objects == * [[Chest (object)|Chest]] * [[Exalted Portal to Inner Chamber]] * [[Exalted Portal to Trial Rooms]] * [[Inner Chamber (object)|Inner Chamber]] == Crafting resources == ; Resource nodes {{section-stub|location|not sure if the Sawgill Mushrooms spawn here too, if they do add, if not, remove tag}} : {{gathering node|Flax}} : {{gathering node|Jungle Plants}} : {{gathering node|Mussels}} : {{gathering node|Ancient Sapling}} : {{gathering node|Palm Sapling}} : {{gathering node|Rich Mithril Vein}} == Trivia == * In French, the verb 'tarir' means to dry up, to dwindle. * Tarir bears a striking resemblance, and may, in fact, be a reference to [[w:El Dorado|El Dorado]], the mythical lost city made purely of gold, believed to exist somewhere in America during the 16th Century. ** Tarir's architectural design is mostly based on [[w:Art Déco|Art Déco]], known to be used in order to reinforce verticality, giving the city a stern wondrous quality. It also feature a few [[w:Pre-Columbian era|pre-colombian]] references, especially suggesting an approximation to [[w:Aztec|Aztec]] architecture – which brings it even closer to El Dorado. * Due to its secluded nature and "superior" inhabitants, Tarir may also be a nod to the hidden elven city of Gondolin, most prominently featured in ''[[w:The Silmarillion|The Silmarillion]]'' by [[w:J.R.R. Tolkien|J.R.R. Tolkien]], edited and published posthumously by his son, [[w:Christopher Tolkien|Christopher Tolkien]]. {{Auric Basin nav}} [[de:Tarir, die Vergessene Stadt]] [[es:Tarir, la Ciudad de los Olvidados]] [[fr:Tarir, la Cité des Oubliés]]

{{otheruses|the zone|the achievement category|Auric Basin (achievements)}} {{Location infobox | levels = 80 | within = Heart of Maguuma | location tree = Tyria; Heart of Maguuma | type = Zone | id = 1043 | region id = 10 | continent id = 1 | requires = hot | loading-screen = Auric Basin loading screen.jpg | connections = [[Gilded Hollow]] (C)
[[Verdant Brink]] (NW)
[[Tangled Depths]] (SE) | pets = [[Juvenile Bristleback|Bristleback]]
[[Juvenile Warthog]] }} [[File:Auric Basin Jungle Treetop map.jpg|thumb|x200px|Jungle Treetop map (Level 3)]] [[File:Auric Basin Exalted Trials map.jpg|thumb|x200px|Exalted Trials map (Level 1)]] [[Auric Basin]] is a zone in the [[Heart of Maguuma]]. At the center of the region is [[Tarir, the Forgotten City]], the golden home to the [[Exalted]]. These magical beings are sworn to protect [[Glint]]'s legacy, and stand with the [[Pact]] against the encroaching threat of [[Mordremoth]]. Outside the city are four camps, Northwatch, Eastwatch, Southwatch, and Westwatch. The Exalted are under attack in all directions from the [[Mordrem]], and events in the area revolve around building up these outposts, charging magical pylons, and retrieving [[Enchanted Armor|enchanted armor]]. These culminate with the defense of Tarir from the Mordrem [[Octovine]]. [[Heart of Maguuma mastery tracks#Exalted Lore|Exalted masteries]] are particularly useful here as they allow for easy navigation using the Exalted portals. [[Nuhoch Wallow]]s are also usable to quickly cross the map. == Getting there == * From [[Verdant Brink]]: the [[portal_(zone)|portal]] in the far southwest corner of the zone, near {{waypoint|Treacherous Path Waypoint}}. * From the [[Gilded Hollow]] guild hall: through the portal in the southwest next to {{waypoint|Surface Tunnel Waypoint}}. Once through, speaking to the Scout may offer a teleport if one does not have the Exalted Mastery necessary to get through the field door. * Using the [[Exalted Portal Stone]] takes you to the underground of [[Tarir, the Forgotten City|Tarir]]. == Map completion == * {{experience|8001}} * {{rewards item|Barbed Thorn|qty=30}} * {{rewards item|Lump of Aurillium|qty=50}} * {{rewards item|Gift of Tarir}} * One of the following, depending on your profession: ** {{rewards item|Guardian's Cache|profession=Guardian}} ** {{rewards item|Revenant's Cache|profession=Revenant}} ** {{rewards item|Warrior's Cache|profession=Warrior}} ** {{rewards item|Engineer's Cache|profession=Engineer}} ** {{rewards item|Ranger's Cache|profession=Ranger}} ** {{rewards item|Thief's Cache|profession=Thief}} ** {{rewards item|Elementalist's Cache|profession=Elementalist}} ** {{rewards item|Mesmer's Cache|profession=Mesmer}} ** {{rewards item|Necromancer's Cache|profession=Necromancer}} * One of the following: ** {{rewards item|Transmutation Charge (item)|chance=chance}} ** {{rewards item|Black Lion Chest Key|chance=chance}} (rare chance) == Locations == {| {{STDT|sortable pve locations}} {{Location table header}} |- | [[Arrowhead Vale]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|hero}} [[Suspicious Orichalcum]] |- | [[Balthazar's Rest]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|hero}} [[Balthazar's Statue]] |- | [[Bristleback Chasm]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|poi}} [[Vinetooth Den]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Weeping Glade]] : {{map icon|vista}} Bristleback Chasm Vista |- | [[Burnisher Quarry]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|poi}} [[Quazupl Grounds]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Burnisher Quarry (hero challenge)|Burnisher Quarry]] : {{map icon|vista}} Burnisher Quarry Vista : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Burnisher Quarry]] |- | [[Chak Hollow]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Chak Hollow Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[Jawatl Grounds]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Egg Clutch (Auric Basin)|Egg Clutch]] : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Jawatl Grounds]] |- | [[Eastwatch Bluff]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Eastwatch Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[Eastwatch Ruins]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Mordrem Flower]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Notice to Trespassers]] : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Eastwatch Bluff]] |- | [[Griffonfall (Auric Basin)|Griffonfall]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|adventure}} [[A Fungus Among Us]] |- | [[Lastgear Standing]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|hero}} [[Ancient Golem Part]] : {{map icon|jp}} [[Highest Gear]] : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Lastgear Standing]] |- | [[Maguuma Shallows]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|lm}} [[Font of Maguuma]] |- | [[Morwood Wilds]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|poi}} [[Thornwatch]] |- | [[Mossheart Walk]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|poi}} [[Endurance Crash Site]] |- | [[Northwatch Descent]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Northwatch Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[Bramble Plateau]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Northwatch Priory Camp]] |- | [[Southwatch Creep]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Southwatch Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[Overseer's Cave]] : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Southwatch Creep]] |- | [[Tarir, the Forgotten City]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Forgotten City Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[Eastgate]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Inner Chamber]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Legacy Pillars]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Luminate's Throne]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Masks of the Fallen]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Northgate]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Sealed Passageway]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Southgate]] : {{map icon|poi}} [[Westgate]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Exalted Overlook]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Champion Tarnished Sage]] : {{map icon|vista}} Tarir Vista : {{map icon|vista}} Inner Chamber Vista : {{map icon|adventure}} [[Fallen Masks]] : {{map icon|adventure}} [[On Wings of Gold]] : {{map icon|adventure}} [[Sanctum Scramble]] : {{map icon|jp}} [[Egg Bearer]] : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Luminate's Throne]] : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: Masks of the Fallen]] |- | [[Tarnished Treetop]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Wanderer's Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[Capitzel Grounds]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Young Mushrooms]] : {{map icon|adventure}} [[The Floor Is Lava|The Floor Is Lava?]] |- | [[The Falls]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|poi}} [[Fahautl Grounds]] : {{map icon|vista}} The Falls Vista : {{map icon|masteryhot}} [[Auric Basin Insight: The Falls]] |- | [[Westwatch Patch]] |align=center|80 | : {{map icon|wp}} Westwatch Waypoint : {{map icon|poi}} [[New Skrittington]] : {{map icon|hero}} [[Toxin-Cured Hog]] : {{map icon|vista}} New Skrittington Vista |} == Interactive map == ;Ground {{Interactive map|floor=1}} ;Treetop {{Interactive map|floor=2}} ;Exalted Trials {{Interactive map|floor=0}} == Events == {{event timer|hot-ab}} The map meta event in Auric Basin is split into two main parts, [[Defending Tarir]] to restore power to outposts and pylons, and [[Battle in Tarir]] to defeat the [[Octovine]]s and [[Mordrem]] besieging the city. Each of the four outposts around the map have different event chains for activating pylons and attacking the [[Octovine]]. === [[Defending Tarir]] === During most of the night, Sages need help activating different outposts and pylons around the map. Eastwatch has been destroyed and there is no event to restore power to Eastwatch. The completion of outposts and pylons have no effect on [[Battle in Tarir]]. ;{{event|Outpost: Northwatch}} *{{event|Collect sediment from the fallen Exalted for Arcanist Mariette}} **{{event|Protect Burnisher Kengo as she activates the mirrors around the Northwatch outpost}} ***{{event|Guard Scholar Keenwit as he translates druid markings}} ****{{event|Destroy the vinewraths and their Mordrem infestation so Scholar Keenwit can complete the druid ritual}} *****{{event|Help Sage Zende defeat the colossal Mordrem thrasher and power up the pylon}} ******{{event|Help the Priory expedition team gather supplies and reach their new research site}} *******{{event|Defend Scholar Morrat from Mordrem as he sets up the research site}} ********{{event|Harvest bramble offshoots for Scholar Morrat's research}} *********{{event|Use the Priory's "Bramble Begone" rifle to clear vines and reach Bramble Plateau}} **********{{event|Defeat the bramble's main stalk}} ;{{event|Ruins of Eastwatch}} *{{event|Defeat vine tenders and defend Sage Korin so he can activate the pylon}} **{{event|Ward Mordrem away from Sage Korin as he activates the Eastwatch pylon}} ***{{event|Protect Sage Korin as he activates the final Eastwatch pylon}} ****{{event|Defeat Vinetooth Prime}} ;{{event|Outpost: Southwatch}} *{{event|Destroy the Mordrem breachers, and secure Southwatch}} **{{event|Defeat Overseer Rannik and rescue Adanich}} ***{{event|Clear Mordrem near Exalted mirrors while Adanich powers-up Southwatch}} ***''This event chain then splits into three sub-chains which run simultaneously.'' ***Southeast split: ****{{event|Escort Sage Vasanni to the airship wreckage in Mossheart Walk}} *****{{event|Rescue the Pact survivors trapped in debris}} ******{{event|Gather meat from saurian nests to attract the wyvern away from the Mossheart pylon}} *******{{event|Help Sage Vasanni defeat the legendary wyvern and power up the pylon}} ***Southern split: ****{{event|Escort Exalted Sage Manssir to Morwood Wilds}} *****{{event|Destroy the feeder to prevent the blighted sapling from producing Mordrem}} (x3) ******{{event|Defend Exalted Sage Manssir as he activates the Thornwatch pylon}} *******{{event|Prevent Blight Tender Monocot from reaching the blighted saplings}} ********{{event|Prevent the blight tenders from reaching the blighted saplings (Dicot)}} *********{{event|Prevent the blight tenders from reaching the blighted saplings (Tricot)}} ***Southwest split: ****{{event|Escort Sage Gorra to the Pact rally point}} *****{{event|Take medical supplies to downed Pact soldiers and escort them back to the Pact Rally point}} ******{{event|Rescue Jett from the belly of the champion Mordrem teragriff}} *******{{event|Escort and defend Sage Gorra as she activates the Griffonfall pylon}} ;{{event|Outpost: Westwatch}} *{{event|Defeat the vine crawler to recover the mirror pieces}} *{{event|Defend Tarocheeki as he searches his stashes to find the missing mirror piece}} *{{event|Protect skritt foragers as they return with supplies from the jungle}} *''Once these three events are completed, the next two events chains start simultaneously.'' **{{event|Catch mushrooms and plant them for Tarocheeki's farm}} ***{{event|Defend Tarocheeki's mushrooms until they have all popped out of the ground}} **{{event|Help Speelunkk explore the cave}} ***{{event|Defeat Auran the Golden Ooze to free Sage Essher}} **''Once these two event chains are completed, the final part of this chain starts.'' ***{{event|Defend Dawkkurra as she gathers saurian eggs for her feast}} ****{{event|Help Dawkkurra with her feast}} *****{{event|Defeat the gold guzzler to find the remaining pieces of Sage Volaar}} === [[Battle in Tarir]] === ;[[Trial by Fire]] The first tier of the Exalted Lore mastery, [[Exalted Markings]], is required to access these challenges. Completing challenges grants a golden enchanted armor to use during the Battle in Tarir. *{{event|Enchanted Armor Challenge: Kick mushrooms into their tyrant king three times!}} ([[Northwatch Descent|northwatch]]) *{{event|Enchanted Armor Challenge: Last one standing wins!}} ([[Eastwatch Bluff|eastwatch]]) *{{event|Enchanted Armor Challenge: Be the first to reach the finish line!}} ([[Southwatch Creep|southwatch]]) *{{event|Enchanted Armor Challenge: Bid aurillium for use of an enchanted armor}} ([[Westwatch Patch|westwatch]]) Simultaneously to the challenge events, the following events occur: *{{event|Defeat the mustering Mordrem before the attack on Tarir begins (Northwatch)}} *{{event|Defeat the mustering Mordrem before the attack on Tarir begins (Eastwatch)}} *{{event|Defeat the mustering Mordrem before the attack on Tarir begins (Southwatch)}} *{{event|Defeat the mustering Mordrem before the attack on Tarir begins (Westwatch)}} ;[[Battle in Tarir]] During this phase of the meta, some should use the enchanted armors and play a crucial role in keeping mobs controlled and moving [[triggerblossom]]s away from other allies. Once the events begin, destroy the outer vine doors with direct damage, and then use the Exalted Portal to travel to the bottom of the city (or glide/walk if one does not have the mastery required) far below where the Octovine resides. All four Octovine parts must be destroyed within two minutes of each other - otherwise the Octovines will regenerate a quarter of their health back. The Octovine is shielded and will only be vulnerable while the shield is removed - the shield is restored after a while. Each of the directions uses a different method to destroy the Octovine's shields (see the respective event pages for further details): *{{event|Destroy the vines blocking Tarir's north entrance}} **{{event|Slay the octovine! (northgate)}} ([[northgate]]) *{{event|Destroy the vines blocking Tarir's east entrance}} **{{event|Slay the octovine! (eastgate)}} ([[eastgate]]) *{{event|Destroy the vines blocking Tarir's south entrance}} **{{event|Slay the octovine! (southgate)}} ([[southgate]]) *{{event|Destroy the vines blocking Tarir's west entrance}} **{{event|Slay the octovine! (westgate)}} ([[westgate]]) ;Other events that appear after completion of the Defending Tarir stage of the meta *{{event|Defeat the bramble's main stalk}} *{{event|Defeat the legendary wyvern}} *{{event|Prevent Blight Tender Monocot from reaching the blighted saplings}} **{{event|Prevent the blight tenders from reaching the blighted saplings (Dicot)}} ***{{event|Prevent the blight tenders from reaching the blighted saplings (Tricot)}} *{{event|Defeat Auran the Golden Ooze}} *{{event|Defeat the gold guzzler}} ;Other events *{{event|Defend the Priory explorer as he purifies the spring at Maguuma Shallows}} (x4) *{{event|Defend the Priory explorer as she purifies the spring at Weeping Glade}} (x8) *{{event|Clear out Balthazar's temple}} *{{event|Defeat the Tarnished Traitor}} *{{event|Find and defeat Acatl}} *{{event|Find and defeat Hiei Sharpblade}} *{{event|Find and defeat Mextli}} *{{event|Find and slay the treasure mushroom! (Auric Basin)}} *{{event|Slay the veteran Mordrem vinetooth}} (x4) == Map bonus rewards == {{map bonus reward}} == Pets == ;[[Juvenile Bristleback]] * [[Bristleback Chasm]] ;[[Juvenile Warthog]] * [[The Falls]] == Crafting resources == : {{gathering icon|wood}} [[Ancient Sapling]] : {{gathering icon|wood}} [[Palm Sapling]] : {{gathering icon|mine}} [[Mithril Ore]] : {{gathering icon|mine}} [[Orichalcum Ore]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Flax]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Jungle Plants]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Mussels]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Sawgill Mushrooms]] ;Recipes : {{Armorsmith}}{{Leatherworker}}{{Tailor}} [[Recipe: Viper's Intricate Gossamer Insignia]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] and [[Aurillium Collector]] : {{Armorsmith}}{{Leatherworker}}{{Tailor}} [[Recipe: Yassith's Viper's Insignia]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Artificer}}{{Huntsman}}{{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Viper's Orichalcum Imbued Inscription]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] and [[Aurillium Collector]] : {{Artificer}}{{Huntsman}}{{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Yassith's Viper's Inscription]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Artificer}} [[Recipe: Exalted Focus Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Artificer}} [[Recipe: Exalted Scepter Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Artificer}} [[Recipe: Exalted Staff Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Huntsman}} [[Recipe: Exalted Longbow Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Huntsman}} [[Recipe: Exalted Pistol Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Huntsman}} [[Recipe: Exalted Rifle Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Huntsman}} [[Recipe: Exalted Torch Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Huntsman}} [[Recipe: Exalted Warhorn Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Huntsman}}[[Recipe: Exalted Short-Bow Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Axe Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Dagger Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Greatsword Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Hammer Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Mace Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Shield Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Weaponsmith}} [[Recipe: Exalted Sword Core]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Jeweler}} [[Recipe: Exquisite Black Diamond Jewel]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] and [[Aurillium Collector]] : {{Chef}} [[Recipe: Bag of Cassava Flour]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Chef}} [[Recipe: Bowl of Lemongrass Mussel Pasta]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Chef}} [[Recipe: Bowl of Prickly Pear Tapioca Pudding]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Chef}} [[Recipe: Jerk Poultry Flatbread Sandwich]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Chef}} [[Recipe: Pile of Jerk Spices]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] : {{Chef}} [[Recipe: Slice of Allspice Cake]] from [[Exalted Mastery Vendor]] == Related achievements == * {{achievement|Home Sweet Homestead: Auric Basin}} == Trivia == * "Auric Basin" is a synonym for "gold sink". == See also == * [[List of chests in Auric Basin]] — a comprehensive list of all hidden chests throughout Auric Basin, and how to find them. {{zone nav}} [[de:Güldener Talkessel]] [[es:Valle Áurico]] [[fr:Bassin aurique]]

revision.comment: /* top */+Add skin acquisition text from CSV.
add ' (skin)' to pages missing the suffix
/* top */+Add skin acquisition text from CSV.
revision.text:
{{otheruses|the [[skin]] unlocked in the [[wardrobe]]|the weapon|Auric Axe|the consumable item|Auric Axe Skin}} {{Skin infobox | name = Auric Axe | icon = Auric Axe.png | type = Axe | set = Auric weapons | acquisition = Obtained through crafting. | id = 6153 | requires = hot | collection = Auric Weapons | gallery1 = Auric Axe.jpg }} [[Auric Axe (skin)|Auric Axe]] is a [[skin]] that is part of the [[Auric weapons]] set.
== Acquisition == {{skin list}}

revision.comment: bot edit - > recipe id to bottom
/* Contents */ 5aurillium, 2empy, spirit shard, green unid, 5piles of auric dust - from a chest by eastwatch pylon
